scripts.db:apply:dev: wrangler d1 migrations apply market-signal-ai-bot-dev-db --env dev --remote
scripts.db:seed:test-user:dev: wrangler d1 execute market-signal-ai-bot-dev-db --env dev --remote --file scripts/dev/seed-test-user.sql
scripts.db:apply:production: wrangler d1 migrations apply market-signal-ai-bot-db --env production --remote
